title: Hollagramz
body:
# Hollagramz

Denver-area band remixed by alphabets (Colin Ward) on **REMIX09** (December 30, 2009). Track: "TROMPERZ CYLCLE [HOLLAGRAMZ]."

The name "Hollagramz" reflects the same playful/experimental capitalization style common in the Denver DIY scene of this period. No further online presence confirmed yet.

## Research Gaps

- Band members unknown
- Bandcamp / SoundCloud presence not confirmed
- Only known via REMIX09 track title

## Sources

- [alphabets REMIX09 — Bandcamp](https://alphabets.bandcamp.com/album/remix09)
